overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a dystopian urban shantytown beneath an elevated highway. The player character navigates through debris and makeshift shelters, passing various NPCs before turning around a graffiti-covered boulder and ascending stairs to an upper plaza as dusk settles over the neon-lit city.

events.description: character with glowing red eyes and purple jacket walks past camera from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow shantytown corridor beneath the concrete overpass

notable_agents.action: character with glowing red eyes and cybernetic implants walking past the camera
character in red outfit standing near debris on the path ahead

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure overhead with support pillars
improvised shelter with green tarp covering wooden pallets
tall white glowing cylindrical lights lining the walkway
futuristic skyscrapers visible through gaps in the trees and overpass

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking through a narrow shantytown corridor beneath an elevated highway. Makeshift tents and debris line the left side while trees and vertical neon lights stand on the right. A character with distinctive glowing red eyes passes by closely on the right, while another figure in red stands ahead on the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area approaching graffiti rock and stairway

events.description: camera begins turning left to navigate around large graffiti-covered boulder

agents.ego_description: continuing forward then turning left to navigate around the large rock formation

notable_agents.action: character in Santa Claus outfit standing near the walkway edge

entered.detail: massive rock covered in colorful spray paint tags and street art
wide staircase leading up to upper plaza level becoming visible ahead

segments.scene_description: The walkway opens slightly as the camera approaches a large graffiti-covered boulder on the left. The path curves around this rock formation, revealing a concrete staircase ahead leading to an upper level. The elevated highway structure shifts to the right side of the frame as the perspective changes.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper plaza with stairs and graffiti art installations

events.description: beginning ascent of concrete stairs to upper plaza level
reaching top of stairs and entering open upper plaza with view of distant neon cityscape

agents.ego_description: ascending the concrete stairs and entering the upper plaza area

notable_agents.action: character in blue vest standing near the top of the stairs
character with white hair leaning against the graffiti wall

entered.detail: concrete wall featuring large painted face artwork and tags
open pedestrian area at the top of the stairs with distant city views

segments.scene_description: The camera moves around the graffiti boulder and begins ascending the concrete stairs to the upper plaza. At the top, the scene opens into a wider area with graffiti murals on the walls and views of distant neon-lit skyscrapers. Characters in various outfits populate this upper level, including one in a Santa hat in the foreground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a cramped, subterranean shantytown corridor into an expansive, neon-lit upper plaza. It begins by navigating a narrow path beneath an elevated highway, passing makeshift tents and debris while a character with glowing red eyes brushes past on the right. As the walkway opens, the camera curves around a large graffiti-covered boulder, causing the highway structure to shift toward the edge of the frame and reveal a concrete staircase. The perspective then ascends these stairs, transitioning from the enclosed alleyway to a wider elevated level adorned with murals. Finally, the scene opens fully onto the plaza, where various NPCs, including a figure in a Santa hat, stand against a backdrop of distant, glowing skyscrapers.
